hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    cmd = data.get('command', '')
except Exception:
    sys.exit(0)
if 'git push' in cmd:
    import subprocess, os
    project = '/Users/o.stadnyk/homework/AI-Coding-Partner-Homework/homework-6'
    result = subprocess.run(['python3', '-m', 'pytest', 'tests/', '--cov=agents', '--cov-fail-under=80', '-q'], cwd=project, capture_output=False)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        print('PUSH BLOCKED: Coverage below 80%. Run: pytest tests/ --cov=agents --cov-report=term-missing')
        sys.exit(1)
sys.exit(0)
"
